label: Dotcom bubble top + unwind
trigger: Fed hiked into a decelerating economy while IPO supply glut exhausted the marginal buyer; valuation had no fundamental floor for the no-earnings cohort.

outcomes.t_plus_5y: SPX recovered to near prior peak; Nasdaq still far below 2000 high

pit_note: What was visible in real time: extreme P/S on no-earnings names, record margin debt, Fed funds rising through 1999-2000. NOT visible: the depth or the exact top date.
